data.name: Doug Fessler
data.headline: Senior Gameplay Engineer
data.objective: To continue growing and learning while creating fun and engaging gameplay experiences, building the systems that drive player agency, narrative, and progression.

projects.name: Last Sentinel
bullets: Architected a Mission system to manage data layers and control mission flow. Enabled designers to fast forward, rewind, and debug mission objectives with minimal iteration cost.
Created an IGC (In-Game Cinematic) framework that empowered designers to script aligned multi-character animated scenes. Supported props, moving platforms, and QTEs in a data-driven way.
Integrated UE5's Level Sequencer into scripting framework and provided multiple binding strategies.
Partnered with design and animation teams to define standards and best practices for scene alignment.
Extended save/load architecture to handle complex contextual saving. Supported mission checkpoints, open world auto saves, quick saves, and multiple mid-mission snapshots.
Created an initial Investigation system to support designer driven detective mechanics. Implemented scanning, hot/cold search feedback, and clue filtering.
Built a marker system with compass to help players navigate the open world and mission flow.
Developed a UI framework (MVVM pattern) and integrated it with UE5's ViewModel architecture.
Organized and led scripting workshops to onboard designers to new tooling. Provided hands-on mentorship, script reviews, and ongoing support.
Mentored and advised both in-house and co-development engineers. Fostered strong technical alignment, knowledge sharing, and consistency across teams.

teams.name: Framework Team
bullets: Implemented a Lua scripting framework on the game server using C++, enabling data-driven mission and quest scripting across multiple teams.
Contributed to improvements to the Unity/C# UI framework for 3D perspective UI.
Provided guidance on scripting and framework systems to designers and engineers across the team.

teams.name: Features Team
bullets: Implemented the design for The Dalaran Heist and Tombs of Terror solo adventure experiences.
Built and extended systems within the Hearthstone Journal: daily and weekly quest tracking, achievement pipelines, and reward progression across multiple expansion cycles.
Refactored hero picker to allow for implementing heroes through data.

projects.name: StarBlood Arena
bullets: Improved custom AI navigation generation, added difficulty levels, and improved basic AI combat.
Set up framework for sending match configurations to matchmaking service and refactored team system to support data from matchmaking.
Implemented single player and cooperative game modes. Optimized wave defense game mode by implementing a pool manager.

projects.name: Vessels of Rath
bullets: Gameplay engineering on an internal action RPG developed to showcase the studio's Orbital cloud platform.

projects.name: Embers of War
bullets: Audited existing code base and retrofitted support for multiplayer.
Implemented a loadout system built around UE4's gameplay abilities and attributes.
Laid groundwork for a proper build process to make builds more readily available.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Developed platform C++ SDK and Unreal Engine 4 SDK.
Created platform integration examples in Unreal Engine 4.
Developed playable game prototypes used in sales pitches and demonstrations.
Designed and built software around platform's RESTful APIs.

projects.name: Ghostbusters 2016
bullets: Worked on AI and gameplay ability systems supporting designers through scripting exposure and troubleshooting.
Modified engine to use dialog audio based on culture settings.
Improved AI by adding a box volume to restrict AI movement to designer-defined areas.

additional_experience.title: Web Developer
bullets: Full stack responsive site estimates and build outs.
Updated sites with new content, creating new graphics, layout designs, and animations.

additional_experience.title: Web Developer
bullets: Full stack development and maintenance on all company websites.
Maintained company LAN, servers, and other computer systems.

data.interests: Game Development, Software Engineering, Gaming, and Computer Hardware. Favorite games: Super Smash Bros., Metal Gear Solid, Final Fantasy, Dark Souls, Hearthstone, World of Warcraft, Overwatch.
